import subprocess

r = subprocess.run(["nvidia-smi", "--query-gpu=utilization.gpu,power.draw", "--format=csv,noheader,nounits"], capture_output=True, text=True)
gpu = r.stdout.strip() if r.stdout else "ERR"

r2 = subprocess.run(["tasklist"], capture_output=True, text=True)
miner_running = "YES" if "miner" in r2.stdout.lower() else "NO"

result = f"GPU:{gpu} MINER:{miner_running}"
